case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. AIDEE E INESTROZA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT INESTROZA, AIDEE E ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [VERONICA ROSALES - APPEARING FOR APOYO FINANCIERO INC.] FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT AODEE E INESTROZA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
